case_title: RICHARD JOHNSON VS. YENYY SIHAPANYA ET AL

docket_entries.description: FEE FOR APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OG GUARDIAN AD LITEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, RICHARD

DISCOVERY,302, AS TO DEFENDANT YENYY SIHAPANYA'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING PLAINTIFFS DEPOSITION AND FOR AN ORDER IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTIONS, THE MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED WITHOUT OPPOSITION. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE SUM OF $60.00 AS AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF ONLY, TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE THE DATE CHOSEN FOR THE DEPOSITION. THE MOVING PARTY PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE REFLECTING AN ATTEMPT TO MEET AND CONFER IN CONNECTION WITH THE PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION NON-APPEARANCE OR TO RESET IT THEREAFTER. THE COURT SHALL PREPARE A FORMAL ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN B. STEIN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiffs Deposition And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT YENYY SIHAPANYA'S Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiffs Deposition And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions, the motion to compel deposition of plaintiff is granted without opposition. Sanctions are awarded in the sum of $60.00 as against the plaintiff only, to be paid on or before the date chosen for the deposition. The moving party presented no evidence reflecting an attempt to meet and confer in connection with the plaintiff's deposition non-appearance or to reset it thereafter. The Court shall prepare a formal order. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
